name: Indoor Insects
blurb: Insects, arachnids, and small invertebrates that turn up indoors. Identification, habitat, and management for the species most frequently encountered.

name: Lawn & Garden Insects
sciName: Pests and beneficials of turf and ornamentals
blurb: Beetles, caterpillars, true bugs, and pollinators across residential lawns, vegetable plots, and ornamental beds.

name: Beetles of Indiana
blurb: Field reference to the beetle families and conspicuous species recorded across Indiana, with emphasis on diagnostic external characters.
